oak.name: The Oak Residences
oak.location: Nairobi, Kenya. Premium Boutique Residential Development.
opportunity: The Oak Residences represents an exclusive collection of high-specification architectural units designed to meet the rising demand from executive tenants desiring low-density boutique layouts.

Positioned within a highly secure perimeter, the asset leverages cutting-edge smart home configurations and low-consumption utility infrastructure to ensure high net operating income margins for early equity partners.

amenities.name: Rooftop Infinity Pool
amenities.description: Panoramic views over the Nairobi skyline with an integrated sun deck.

amenities.name: Wellness Gym
amenities.description: State-of-the-art cardiovascular and strength training equipment.

amenities.name: Executive Lounge
amenities.description: Private meeting spaces and 24/7 concierge services for residents.

amenities.name: Full Power Backup
amenities.description: Dual synchronized generators ensuring 100% uninterrupted operations.

gemini-residency.name: Gemini Residency
gemini-residency.exit: Individual Unit Sale or Capital Refinance
opportunity: Gemini Residency Westlands is a modern off-plan residential development located in Brookside Grove, Westlands, Nairobi, offering luxury 1 and 2 bedroom apartments designed for both homeowners and investors. The sleek, futuristic tower features smart-home technology, premium European finishes, and breathtaking views.

The development boasts unmatched amenities including a heated rooftop infinity pool, private padel court, rooftop BBQ lounge, yoga studio, spa, fully equipped gym, on-site café, and a serene co-working space, driving high rental demand and strong capital appreciation.

renders.alt: Sleek futuristic exterior of Gemini Residency
Spacious open-plan living room with premium finishes
Luxurious modern bedroom with smart-home features

jabali.name: Jabali Towers One-Bedroom Apartment
jabali.tagline: Your Private Sanctuary in the City
opportunity: Crafted for individuals or couples who value privacy, comfort, and convenience.
Features a well-proportioned living space, an ensuite bedroom, and a private balcony overlooking the city's greenery and skyline.
Located within a thriving ecosystem of long-term value in Tatu City.

grosvenor-residency.name: Grosvenor Residency
grosvenor-residency.tagline: Step into a life less ordinary
opportunity: Meticulously crafted 1- and 2-bedroom apartments in Westlands, Nairobi's most coveted neighborhood.
Flexible 3-year payment plan with only 20% deposit.
High-end finishes, intelligent layouts, and world-class amenities including dual heated pools and a padel court.
Significant cash discounts available with up to KES 3.9M discount for cash buyers.
